hero.title: Email Designer & Operations Specialist
hero.description: Designing high-quality emails and executing flawless setups across all major platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Brevo, Beehiiv, and more). From custom layouts for Ecom, B2B, and Newsletters to account setup, automated flows, segments, campaign deployment, and reporting.
